description_long: This is a thick, rectangular book with a dark reddish-brown cover that appears slightly worn and textured, suggesting frequent use or age. The cover is solid and opaque, with no visible illustrations, patterns, or text, giving it a classic and understated appearance. The edges of the book are slightly uneven, and the pages are visible along the sides, showing a white to light gray coloration. The spine is plain and blends seamlessly with the cover, lacking any decorative elements or visible text. The book's overall form is robust and blocky, with a slight bulge on one side, possibly indicating a well-used or older volume. Its size and appearance suggest it could be a hardcover novel, reference book, or journal commonly found in urban environments such as libraries, schools, or personal bags.
description: A thick, reddish-brown hardcover book with a plain, slightly worn cover and visible white pages. The book has a robust, blocky form and no visible illustrations or text.
description_view_0: The book is seen from an angle showing the front cover, spine, and a portion of the pages, with a noticeable bulge along the bottom edge.
description_view_1: This view highlights the back cover and the book's thickness, with the spine and page edges less visible.
description_view_2: The front cover and the clean, straight edge of the pages are most prominent, with the book's rectangular shape clearly defined.
description_view_3: The book is shown from the opposite side, displaying the plain cover and the even, white page edges, with minimal spine detail.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is plain and matches the reddish-brown color of the cover, with no visible text or decorative elements.
